title: たまにはガキの頃みたく

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Vodka and I are taking a stroll through
the park when we hear a loud yelp from Daiwa
Scarlet.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
H-hey! How many times do I have to tell you not
to grab my tail? Ugh!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hm? What's Scarlet makin' a fuss about now?

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Your tail is sooo fluffy!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Come on, stop grabbing it already!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huff… huff... Geez!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Sup, Scarlet? Looks like you're havin' fun with
these little troublemakers.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Excuse me?! You're joking, right?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
If this looks like fun to you, you're more than
welcome to take my place!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Nah, I'm good. I wouldn't wanna steal your
thunder.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: C'mon, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: H-hey! You're just going to leave me here?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I guess I could help you, but you'll owe me one.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Urgh... Why do I have to owe you?!
choice_data_list: Why don't you just help her out?
Why don't you just help her out?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Huh? Man... You're way too nice, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Fine, fine. I'll give her a hand.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hey, you munchkins! Don't hassle Scarlet there too much, okay?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
If you wanna play that badly, why don'tcha play
with me instead?

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: Really? Hooray!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I-I'm finally free... Ugh, I'm totally exhausted...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Sheesh, just from that? You sure you're not
slackin' off on your training?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
What?! Of course not! These kids just have way
too much energy!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
All kids are like that. You really gotta give 'em all
your energy, so you need a good amount of
stami—

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...na. Stamina?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Wait, I've got it! This might be a good way to
train.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hey Trainer! Got any kid-friendly training ideas?
choice_data_list: Time for a game of tag!
Time for a game of tag!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hey Trainer! Got any kid-friendly training ideas?
choice_data_list: Time for a game of tag!
Time for a game of tag!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Tag! Good idea! It's basically all runnin'!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Heheh. These munchkins aren't outrunnin' me any
time soon though.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Let's see... Scarlet should be "it" first!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Wait just a second! Why do I have to play too?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I mean, you're the only one that stands a chance
of catching me.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: That's true... Hey, wait!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Why are you one of the runners? Go be "it"
yourself!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: C'mon, everyone! We've gotta run from Scarlet!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Ahhh!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: H-hey! Wait up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Moments later, Vodka and the kids are running
all over the park, Scarlet hot on their heels.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Runnin'... like this... really gets you out of breath!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... How did I... get dragged into this?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Haha, you say that like you weren't goin' all
tryhard tryin' to catch me!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hrk... N-no, I wasn't!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Haha! You don't have to hide it!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Anyhow, it's kinda nice runnin' around like kids
every once in a while, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she chats with Scarlet, Vodka's expression
softens into an especially warm, content grin.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: The jungle gym? Not a bad idea!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: All right, I'm gonna be the first one to the top!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: Hey, no fair! Wait up!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Heheh. Try gettin' to the top first if you don't like
it!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sigh... You're not supposed to compete with them like they're on your level.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: What's that supposed to mean?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm just telling the truth. Everything about you is
childish!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: How would you feel if an opponent on the track went easy on you?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
If they looked down on you—like they could beat
you in their sleep.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'd be insulted, of course. I wouldn't let them get
away with it.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Right? Same goes for these kids.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: It's no fun if you treat 'em like they don't matter.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Not takin' your opponent seriously is just about
the lamest thing I can think of.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
So I'm gonna race my way to the top before
anyone else!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I'm definitely gonna be sore tomorrow. My
arms and legs feel like they're gonna fall off.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Huh? What's with that look, Scarlet? Just come
out and call me childish again.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: There's no point.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: What's that supposed to mean?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I want you to save all your energy for when you race me!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But there's no point telling you that, since it's not
like you'd listen anyways.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Heheh, of course not. But you know I'd never give
you anything except everythin' I've got!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No matter who Vodka faces on the track in the
future, I'm confident she'll never give anything
less than her all.
